admissible_next_artifacts.required_claim: uniform post-K8 K-tail ratio or direct remainder bound for the free-subtracted interaction delta
a later K point may be used only with a predeclared threshold derived from this obligation

forbidden_shortcuts: treating K8/N4 or K6/N5 finite evidence as exact regulator removal
promoting K9/N4 without a predeclared post-K8 threshold
changing the observable or target theory to shrink the tail
hiding the occupation cutoff after the K6/N5 support classification
no_workaround_status: not achieved; this obligation converts finite evidence into a proof target and explicitly keeps K and N as unremoved temporary regulators
quantity: post-K8 Schwinger interaction-delta K-tail proof obligation

required_post_k8_bound.geometric_certificate_condition: prove a post-K8 effective ratio r with 0 <= r <= required_effective_tail_ratio_after_K8, so abs(K8-K7)*r/(1-r) <= target_tail_bound
